query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS donations (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  donor_name VARCHAR(255),
  donor_email VARCHAR(255),
  donor_phone VARCHAR(50),
  donor_address TEXT,
  amount DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,
  donation_type ENUM('one_time', 'recurring', 'pledge', 'in_kind') DEFAULT 'one_time',
  payment_method ENUM('credit_card', 'bank_transfer', 'check', 'cash', 'paypal', 'other') DEFAULT 'credit_card',
  campaign_id INT,
  designation VARCHAR(255),
  is_anonymous BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  tax_receipt_number VARCHAR(100),
  tax_receipt_sent BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  tax_receipt_sent_at TIMESTAMP NULL,
  notes TEXT,
  status ENUM('pending', 'completed', 'failed', 'refunded') DEFAULT 'pending',
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
